title: CodeReader Object Properties
description:
CodeReader Object Properties

CodeReader Object Properties

The following list is a summary of properties for the CodeReader object.  The details for each property are explained in the Vision Guide 8.0 Properties and Results Reference Manual.

Property	Description

AbortSeqOnFail	Allows the user to specify that if the
		 specified object fails (not found), then the entire sequence is
		 aborted at that point and no further objects in the sequence are
		 processed.

Default:
		 False

Accept	Specifies the score that a search must
		 equal or exceed to be considered found.

Default:
		 700

Caption	Used to assign a caption to the CodeReader
		 object.

Default:
		 Empty String

CenterPntObjResult	Specifies which result to use from the
		 CenterPointObject property.

If All is specified, CodeReader object
		 will be applied to all of the (NumberFound) for specified vision
		 object results.

Default:
		 1

CenterPntOffsetX	Sets or returns the X offset after the
		 center point of the search window is positioned with the CenterPointObject.

Default:
		 0

CenterPntOffsetY	Sets or returns the Y offset after the
		 center point of the search window is positioned with the CenterPointObject.

Default:
		 0

CenterPointObject	Specifies the position to be used as
		 the center point for the CodeReader Search. This property is normally
		 set to base the center of the CodeReader Search on the XY position
		 result from another vision object.

Default:
		 Screen

CodeType	Sets / returns which type of bar code
		 or two dimensional code to search for with the CodeReader object.

Default:
		 Auto

CoordObject	Specifies Coordinates object to copy
		 the result.

The copy is executed when the object is
		 executed, and if it didn't execute because of branch function
		 of Decision, the copy will not be executed.

Default: None

CurrentResult	Defines which result to display in the
		 Results list (on the Object window) or which result to return
		 data for when the system is requested to find more than one of
		 a like feature within a single search window.

Description	Sets a user description

Default: Blank

Enabled	Specifies whether to execute the object.

Default: True

FailColor	Selects the color of an object when
		 it is not accepted.

Default:
		 Red

FoundColor	Selects the color for an object when
		 it is found.

Default:
		 Light Green

Frame	Specifies which positioning frame to
		 use.

Default:
		 none

FrameResult	Specifies which number of the Frame
		 results to be used.

Default:
		 1

Graphics	Specifies which graphics to display.

Default:
		 All

LabelBackColor	Selects the background color for the
		 object's label.

Default:
		 Transparent

Name	Used to assign a unique name to the
		 CodeReader object.

Default:
		 Codexx

NumberToFind	Defines the number of codes to find.

Max: 4

Default:
		 1

Orientation	Defines the direction of a barcode

PassColor	Selects the color for an object when
		 it is passed objects.

Default:
		 LightGreen

PassType	Selects the rule that determines if
		 the object passed.

Default:
		 SomeFound

Polarity	Defines the differentiation between
		 objects and background. (Either "Dark Object on Light Background"
		 or "Light Object on Dark Background".)

Default:
		 DarkOnLight

SearchWin	Runtime only.
		 Sets / returns the search window left, top, height, width parameters
		 in one call.

SearchWinHeight	Defines the height of the area to be
		 searched (unit: pixel).

Default:
		 100

SearchWinLeft	Defines the
		 left most position of the area to be searched (unit: pixel).

SearchWinTop	Defines the
		 upper most position of the area to be searched (unit: pixel).

SearchWinWidth	Defines the width of the area to be
		 searched (unit: pixel).

Default:
		 100

CodabarChecksumEnabled	Sets whether to consider the check sum
		 at Codabar detection.

CodabarOutputChecksum	Sets whether to include the check sum
		 value in Codabar detection result.

CodabarOutputStartStop	Sets whether to include the start and
		 stop characters in Codabar detection result.

Code39ChecksumEnabled	Sets whether to consider the check sum
		 at CODE 39 detection.

Code39OutputChecksum	Sets whether to include the check sum
		 value in CODE 39 detection result.

Code39OutputStartStop	Sets whether to include the start and
		 stop characters in CODE 39 detection result.

Code128OutputChecksum	Sets whether to include the check sum
		 value in CODE 128 detection result.

DataMatrixConnectDots	Specifies whether or not to pre-process
		 connected dots for a DataMatrix code using round dots.

DataMatrixMinLength	Sets the minimum DataMatrix code size.

DataMatrixPolarity	Specifies the polarity of the DataMatrix
		 code to search for.

ITFChecksumEnabled	Sets whether to consider the check sum
		 at Interleaved 2 of 5(ITF) detection.

ITFOutputChecksum	Sets whether to include the check sum
		 value in Interleaved 2 of 5(ITF) detection result.

PDFScanInterval	Sets the scanning line pitch to scan
		 PDF417 codes.

QRLargeSize	Set this property to "True" when the
		 QR code is large for the view field.

QRMinContrast	Sets the minimum contrast to scan QR
		 codes.

QRMinLength	Sets the minimum QR code size.

QRNarrowQuietZone	Sets the quiet zone width (Normal or
		 Narrow) of QR codes.

QROutputID	Sets whether to include the data carrier
		 identifier in the QR code scanning result.

UPCExpansionEnabled	Sets whether to support supplemental
		 data of UPC-E.

UPCOutputChecksum	Sets whether to include the check sum
		 value in UPC detection result.
